chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-216 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag (A) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A No.1816/2025 (S/A) 17-7-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for applicant Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- By consent of the learned counsel for both the parties, including the learned Deputy Prosecutor General, the matter is remanded to the Court of Sessions with direction to examine the case thoroughly. After affording an opportunity of hearing to both parties and upon scrutiny of all material available on record, the Court shall determine whether the names of respondents No.2 and 3 were rightly placed in column No.II by the Investigating Officer or otherwise. Such determination shall be made within a period of one month from today. The instant Criminal Misc. Application is disposed of along with listed application, in the above terms. J U D G E Naveed Ali
